title: Three killed in crash near Louvain on the N9
description: GARDEN ROUTE AND KLEIN-KAROO NEWS - At least...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE AND KLEIN-KAROO NEWS - At least three people were killed in a minibus taxi accident on the N9 near Louvain Guest Farm between Herold and Uniondale this morning, Monday 13 October.


> According to initial reports, only the taxi was involved in the crash.


The driver allegedly lost control of the vehicle, which rolled and landed on its roof in a field next to the road.Emergency services are transporting 14 other passengers to the hospital for treatment.

More information will be released as it becomes available.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
